name: darkfin-slides
description: Dark fintech/blockchain PowerPoint deck builder. 29 slate-palette HTML slide templates (title, problem, KPI, timelines, pricing, roadmap, scoring tiers, etc.) converted to .pptx via Playwright + PptxGenJS. Bundles 39 cyan icon PNGs, 12 gradient step-number PNGs, and pre-rendered glow backgrounds. Default tone is slate (Tailwind-aligned); custom palettes supported via gen-assets/icons/numbers + sed hex swap.
